about.hero_title: HuntZen Jobs: Your #1 Career Ally in France
about.hero_subtitle: Discover how HuntZen Jobs is revolutionizing job searching in France with the power of AI and a candidate-centered approach.
about.who_p1: HuntZen Jobs is the next-generation job search platform that transforms the way candidates find their next job in France. HuntZen combines cutting-edge technology, artificial intelligence and HR expertise to deliver an unrivaled job search experience.
about.who_p2: Founded in 2024, HuntZen Jobs was born from a simple vision: to make job searching more efficient, more human, and more accessible to all. With HuntZen, we believe every candidate deserves the best opportunities and the most powerful tools to succeed in their career.
about.who_p3: Today, HuntZen Jobs aggregates over 100,000 job listings in France, covering all sectors, all experience levels and all contract types. The HuntZen platform analyzes thousands of listings daily from the largest job sites to offer you the most complete catalog on the French market.
about.why_subtitle: HuntZen Jobs offers you much more than a simple list of job listings. Discover our 3 pillars that make HuntZen the #1 platform.
about.feature1_desc: HuntZen Jobs aggregates +100,000 job listings in France from the largest platforms: Indeed, LinkedIn, Pôle Emploi, APEC and many others. With HuntZen, you access all opportunities in one place.
about.feature2_desc: Our HuntZen technology analyzes your CV in depth and gives you a precise ATS score. The HuntZen Jobs CV analysis tool identifies weaknesses and provides concrete recommendations to improve your chances of landing an interview.
about.feature3_desc: The HuntZen career assistant guides you at every step: interview preparation, salary negotiation, LinkedIn optimization. With HuntZen Jobs, you have a professional coach available 24/7.
about.story_p1: Founded in 2024, HuntZen Jobs is revolutionizing the job search market in France. The HuntZen team identified a major problem: candidates waste hours browsing multiple job sites, optimizing their CV without guidance, and preparing for interviews alone.
about.story_p2: The vision of HuntZen Jobs? Centralize all job listings, provide professional analysis tools and offer personalized support through artificial intelligence. Within a few months, HuntZen became the reference for thousands of candidates in France.
about.story_p3: Today, HuntZen Jobs has over 50,000 active users who use the platform daily to find their next job. The HuntZen community grows every day, and our mission remains the same: to make job searching more efficient and more human.
about.vs_subtitle: Discover why HuntZen Jobs outperforms Indeed, LinkedIn and others
about.vs_item1_desc: HuntZen centralizes ALL listings (Indeed, LinkedIn, Pôle Emploi...)
about.vs_item2_desc: Precise ATS score included - paid on other platforms
about.vs_item4_desc: Intuitive and fast UX - far superior to others
about.vs_item5_desc: AI recommendations based on your complete profile
about.cta_subtitle: Transform your job search with the #1 platform in France. HuntZen Jobs is 100% free and commitment-free.
